query: Build an MCP server that lets agents search our internal Confluence wiki.
expected_behavior: Defines the MCP tool schema with typed arguments (query string, max_results, space_key) using Zod
Implements the MCP server with a health check endpoint
Fails fast with a specific error if the Confluence API token is missing — does not silently return empty results
Does not build a monolithic server that does 10 things — one MCP tool per job
Validates all input arguments before making any API call to Confluence
